minimal_callable_path: import whisper; model = whisper.load_model("turbo", device="cpu", download_root=<weights_root>); result = model.transcribe(<fixture>, fp16=False)
exact_commands_or_steps: Create a fresh Python 3.10 virtual environment in a new temporary working directory.
Use the resolved local weight path from weights_manifest.json unless the file is missing.
Export PATH to include repro_bundle/tools so the bundled ffmpeg fallback resolves before running inference.
Run the direct Whisper import/load/transcribe command against the bundled fixture and validate that result["text"] is non-empty.
working_directory_assumptions: Run from a fresh temporary directory, not from the phase-1 model directory.
The bundle fixture is available at repro_bundle/fixtures/en_16k_10s.wav copied into the fresh workspace.
